string.name: app_description
string.value: 跨品牌智能养宠平台，整合16款智能硬件统一控制

string.name: permission_location_reason
string.value: 用于实时追踪宠物位置和运动轨迹

string.name: permission_microphone_reason
string.value: 用于与宠物进行语音对讲

string.name: permission_internet_reason
string.value: 用于连接云端服务和远程控制设备

string.name: permission_distributed_reason
string.value: 用于鸿蒙分布式设备协同和软总线组网

string.name: permission_bluetooth_reason
string.value: 用于连接智能项圈和喂食器等蓝牙设备

string.name: permission_wifi_reason
string.value: 用于连接Wi-Fi网络和设备通信

string.name: permission_sensor_reason
string.value: 用于读取运动传感器数据监测宠物活动

string.name: permission_motion_reason
string.value: 用于监测宠物运动状态和步数统计
